description: Hairline cracking to deck surface near expansion joint. Width <0.2mm.
notes: Monitor at next inspection. Apply sealant if cracks widen.

description: Transverse cracking with delamination of concrete cover across Span 2. Evidence of reinforcement corrosion on underside of deck.
notes: Full depth deck repair required. Corrosion inhibitor treatment and patch repair programme.

description: Active scour at Pier 2 base. Scour depth 300mm below design level. Undermining of pile cap detected.
notes: Rock armour protection works required urgently. Geotechnical investigation required.

description: Scour at Pier 4 similar to Pier 2 but at shallower depth (280mm).
notes: Scour protection works as part of Pier 2 programme.

description: Severe structural cracking and delamination across 40% of deck. Spalling of concrete cover exposing main reinforcement bars. Active corrosion.
notes: URGENT - Full deck replacement required. Load restrictions in place. Close monitoring until rehabilitation completed.

description: Structural crack 2.5mm width at abutment wall. Possible foundation movement. Water ingress.
notes: Structural engineer to assess. Monitor crack width monthly. Underpinning may be required.

description: CRITICAL SCOUR - 550mm scour at Pier 1 with pile cap undermining. Immediate structural risk.
notes: EMERGENCY - Scour remediation emergency works ordered. Bridge under monitoring. Mass restrictions in force.

description: Concrete spalling at waterline exposing reinforcement. Estimated 15% section loss.
notes: Concrete repair and cathodic protection recommended at next maintenance cycle.

description: Guard rail posts corroded at base. 6 of 12 posts showing >50% section loss.
notes: Guard rail replacement in progress - contractor engaged.

description: Failed neoprene seal in expansion joint allowing water ingress to deck soffit.
closureNotes: Joint resealed with new neoprene extrusion. Drains cleared.
notes: Repair completed successfully. No further action required.
